messages.content: 中译英：我担任了他大三时期“文件检验”课程的老师。
I served as the teacher for his "Document Inspection" course during his junior year.
润色如下内容：I served as the teacher for his “Document Inspection” course during his junior year.
I was the instructor for his "Document Inspection" course during his junior year.

润色如下内容：I am writing with great pleasure to recommend Mr. Yiwei LU, one of my students for acceptance into your esteemed postgraduate program. I was the instructor for Yiwei’s Document Inspection course during his junior year. As his teacher, I gained frequent contact with Yiwei, who in my eyes is always a diligent, bright, and exceptional student.

I am thrilled to write this letter of recommendation for Mr. Yiwei LU, a highly deserving candidate for your prestigious postgraduate program. During his junior year, I had the privilege of being Yiwei's instructor for the Document Inspection course. Throughout our time together, I had the opportunity to closely observe Yiwei's exceptional qualities as a diligent and bright student.
中译英：在小组作业中，他非常注重与我的及时沟通，会根据我的反馈与提议对研究设计进行修改完善。我还记得他们的小组作业主题为“签章真伪的辨别”，在被指出内容过于空泛后，他积极找我去了解这个方面的内容，我也带他们小组去了司法鉴定所进行参观考察，最终使得小组作业趋于完善。而在小组作业课堂演讲环节，他作为小组代表演讲了“签章真伪的辨别”，内容十分具体，演讲十分清晰和有逻辑。

During group assignments, he demonstrated a keen focus on timely communication with me. He would promptly address my feedback and suggestions to improve the research design. I particularly recall their group assignment on "Distinguishing the Authenticity of Seals." When it was pointed out that the content was somewhat vague, he took the initiative to approach me and inquire about relevant information in this area. I took their group on a visit to a forensic authentication institution, allowing them to gain practical insights. As a result, the group assignment significantly improved. In the presentation segment of the group assignment class, he confidently represented the team, delivering a highly specific speech on "Distinguishing the Authenticity of Seals" that was both coherent and logical.

润色如下内容：In my course, Yiwei was an active learner who was not only attentive to my lectures but often took the initiative to participate in class discussions. He always tended to be the first student to respond to the questions I raised during the class. During group assignments, moreover, Yiwei demonstrated a keen focus on timely communication with me. He would promptly address my feedback and suggestions to improve the research design. I particularly recall their group assignment on “Distinguishing the Authenticity of Seals.” When it was pointed out that the content was somewhat vague, he took the initiative to approach me and inquire about relevant information in this area. I took their group on a visit to a forensic authentication institution, allowing them to gain practical insights. As a result, the group assignment significantly improved. In the presentation segment of the group assignment class, he confidently represented the team, delivering a highly specific speech on “Distinguishing the Authenticity of Seals” that was both coherent and logical. Yiwei impressed me with his outstanding communication and expression skills.

Yiwei was an engaged and proactive learner in my course, consistently displaying attentiveness to my lectures and actively participating in class discussions. He consistently positioned himself as the first student to respond to the questions I raised during class. Furthermore, in group assignments, Yiwei's commitment to effective communication with me was evident. He promptly addressed my feedback and suggestions in order to enhance the research design. I distinctly recall our group assignment on "Distinguishing the Authenticity of Seals." Recognizing that the content initially lacked specificity, Yiwei proactively approached me to seek out relevant information. To provide practical insights, I organized a visit to a forensic authentication institution for their group. This visit proved instrumental in greatly improving the quality of their assignment. During the presentation phase of the group assignment, Yiwei confidently represented the team, delivering a precise and logical speech on "Distinguishing the Authenticity of Seals." I was particularly impressed by his exceptional communication and expression skills.
中译英：由于他出色的课堂表现以及对知识点牢固的掌握
Due to his outstanding performance in class and strong grasp of the subject matter
润色如下内容：Due to his outstanding performance in class and strong grasp of the subject matter
Due to his exceptional performance in class and his firm understanding of the subject matter
润色如下内容：Due to his outstanding performance in class and his firm grasp of the relevant knowledge, Yiwei ultimately succeeded in achieving a high score of 94 in the final evaluation of my course.
Thanks to his exceptional performance in class and his strong command of the relevant knowledge, Yiwei ultimately achieved an impressive score of 94 in the final evaluation of my course.

润色如下内容：After class, he completed nearly all his homework assignments with high quality and efficiency, showing his firm grasp of the novel knowledge covered in class.  Also, he would tend to discuss cases regarding document inspection at home and abroad with me. It could be seen his intense thirst for knowledge.

After class, he consistently demonstrated exceptional diligence and efficiency in completing nearly all of his homework assignments. This not only showcases his strong understanding of the new knowledge covered in class but also highlights his commitment to excellence. Additionally, he often engaged in discussions with me about document inspection cases both domestically and internationally. It is evident that his thirst for knowledge is fervent and unwavering.
润色如下内容：I greatly appreciate his academic passion
I highly appreciate his unwavering academic passion
中译英：他非常有集体荣誉感以及社会责任感。我了解到他曾作为学术部的成员多次协助部门完成活动，并协助过学院以及学生会多次学术讲座的举办，具有很强的执行力和团队合作能力。同时他也利用空闲时间参与了社区法律服务周以及进博会等多项志愿者服务。

He possesses a strong sense of collective honor and social responsibility. I have learned that he has served as a member of the academic department, assisting in numerous activities organized by the department. He has also played a key role in organizing academic lectures on behalf of the college and student union, demonstrating exceptional execution skills and teamwork abilities. Additionally, he has actively engaged in community legal service weeks and volunteered in events such as the Import Expo.

润色如下内容：He possesses a strong sense of collective honor and social responsibility. I have learned that he has served as a member of the academic department, assisting in numerous activities organized by the department. He has also played a key role in organizing academic lectures on behalf of the college and student union, demonstrating exceptional execution skills and teamwork abilities. Additionally, he has actively engaged in community legal service weeks and volunteered in events such as the Import Expo.

He possesses a strong sense of collective honor and social responsibility. I have learned that he has actively contributed as a member of the academic department, providing valuable assistance in organizing various departmental activities. Moreover, he has played a pivotal role in coordinating academic lectures on behalf of both the college and the student union, showcasing exceptional execution skills and a strong aptitude for teamwork. In addition to his academic commitments, he has also actively participated in community legal service weeks and volunteered at events like the Import Expo.
中译英：在我看来，他的社会责任感值得称赞。
In my opinion, his sense of social responsibility is commendable.
润色如下内容：In my opinion, his sense of social responsibility is commendable.
In my perspective, his profound sense of social responsibility is praiseworthy.
Please give me a recommendation letter sample

[Your Name]
[Your Designation/Title]
[Your Institution/Organization]
[Your Contact Information]

[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Designation/Title]
[Recipient's Institution/Organization]
[Recipient's Address]

Subject: Letter of Recommendation for [Applicant's Name]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing this letter with great pleasure to highly recommend Mr./Ms. [Applicant's Name] for consideration into your esteemed [program/scholarship/internship/job position]. Having been [Applicant's Name]'s [Teacher/Supervisor/Colleague] during their time at [Institution/Organization], I have had the privilege of closely observing their intellectual prowess, work ethic, and remarkable personal characteristics.

[Applicant's Name] has consistently demonstrated exceptional academic aptitude throughout their academic journey. I had the opportunity to teach them in [Course Name] and was impressed by their remarkable ability to grasp complex concepts and their unyielding commitment to academic excellence. Their active participation in class discussions, prompt submission of high-quality assignments, and eagerness to expand their knowledge further exemplify their dedication to learning.

In addition to their outstanding academic performance, [Applicant's Name] possesses excellent interpersonal and communication skills. They consistently displayed effective teamwork and cooperation during group projects, fostering a positive and productive learning atmosphere. This ability to collaborate, coupled with their natural leadership qualities, enabled them to lead their peers and efficiently manage projects, resulting in successful outcomes.

Furthermore, I would like to highlight [Applicant's Name]'s remarkable sense of social responsibility and community involvement. They actively participated in various extracurricular activities, such as [mention specific activities], where they showcased their admirable commitment to serving others and making a meaningful impact on society. Their dedication to social causes adds depth to their character and reflects their strong ethical values.

In summary, I wholeheartedly endorse [Applicant's Name] for [program/scholarship/internship/job position]. They possess the academic aptitude, exceptional work ethic, interpersonal skills, and social responsibility necessary to thrive in [Recipient's Name]'s esteemed program. I am confident that [Applicant's Name] will not only excel academically but also contribute positively to the academic and social fabric of [Recipient's Institution/Organization].

Please feel free to contact me at [Your Contact Information] if you require any further information or have any questions regarding [Applicant's Name]. I truly believe that [Applicant's Name] is an exceptional candidate and would be a valuable addition to your [program/scholarship/internship/job position].

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Designation/Title]
[Your Institution/Organization]
